title: ajuga bracteosa var. densiflora
intro: Ajuga bracteosa var. densiflora, also known as Chinese bugleweed, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of Ajuga bracteosa var. densiflora typically include teas, infusions, and tinctures made from the leaves and roots, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
